description_long: This is a coastal motel complex featuring several two-story buildings with red-tiled gable roofs and pastel-colored facades, arranged around a central paved courtyard. The buildings are constructed with stucco walls, stone foundations, and wooden window frames, and are adorned with exterior staircases, balconies, and decorative shutters. The property includes a small dock and sandy beach area with a rowboat, suggesting direct waterfront access for guests. Lush greenery, shrubs, and potted plants are interspersed throughout the grounds, adding to the inviting atmosphere. The motel is elevated above a stone retaining wall, with steps and ramps providing access from the lower beach to the upper courtyard. Outdoor furniture, signage, and lamp posts are visible, enhancing the sense of a welcoming, functional hospitality venue.
description: A charming coastal motel complex with red-tiled roofs, pastel facades, and a central courtyard, set above a stone retaining wall with direct beach and dock access.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance area, showing two prominent buildings with red-tiled roofs and pastel facades, as well as the stone retaining wall and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side of the motel is visible, revealing more of the yellow building, exterior staircases, and additional greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: This perspective showcases the waterfront side, with the dock, sandy beach, and rowboat, as well as the arrangement of buildings around the central courtyard.
description_view_3: This view looks down the main walkway toward the water, emphasizing the exterior corridors, staircases, and the transition from the courtyard to the dock and beach.
